checks.message: Base GR successor equivalence report must pass before L2 hardening can pass.
GR successor pilot PDF must compile and render.
GR pilot posture must remain domain-bounded CERT-CLOSE.
GR global-subcriticality frontier must remain active.
L2 GR pilot must not supersede the canonical GR Branch Book.
Every generated GR pilot claim must have non-empty human-authored body text; proof files are checked when declared.
